message:
fix(test): remove tautological TestRoleFlagValidation

TestRoleFlagValidation reimplemented the same switch statement from production
code and tested its own local logic instead of exercising the actual role
validation in init.go. Remove it — the production validation (which calls
FatalError/os.Exit) is better covered by integration tests, and this unit
test provided false confidence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
